title: Michael Brown
compiled_truth: Michael Brown is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-02-09 to 2002-01-14), Michael Brown sent 18 and received 609 emails, totalling 627 interactions. Top correspondents: [Sara Shackleton](people/sara-shackleton) (6), [John Sherriff](people/john-sherriff) (4), [Justin Boyd](people/justin-boyd) (3), [Richard Shapiro](people/richard-shapiro) (3), [Greg Whalley](people/greg-whalley) (3).
